LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT ARGUED AND THE COURT GRANTS SAID MOTION. HEARING HELD TO ADDRESS WHY THE CITY'S MOTION SHOULD NOT BE GRANTED BASED ON UNDISPUTED FACT 7 AND PLAINTIFF'S TESTIMONY AT 63: 13 THROUGH 22. 67: 23, THROUGH 68 AT LINE 6 AND 120: 18 THROUGH 22. THE FACT PATTERN APPEARS TO BE GOVERNED BY GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 8304 AND CHOWDHURY V CITY OF LOS ANGELES (1995) 38 CAL APP 4TH 1187. COURT RULES ON EVIDENTIARY OBJECTIONS AS FOLLOWS: BORDEN DECLARATION, OBJECTIONS FOUR AND FIVE ARE OVERRULED. EXHIBIT E TO THE EISENBERG DECLARATION IS SUSTAINED. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. (302/PJM/AY) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
